      "question": "Consider a finite horizon game with two players where the first player has two strategies (A and B) and the second player has two strategies (X and Y). The payoffs for each strategy combination are as follows: A-X = 10, A-Y = 5, B-X = 8, B-Y = 3. What is the sub-game perfect equilibrium strategy combination?",
      "options": [
        "A) A-X",
        "B) A-Y",
        "C) B-X",
        "D) B-Y"
      ],
